title: Group 1 Fruit Flies: Tephritidae ‐ Bactrocera zonata Webinar 6
text: Abstract This report details the main results of the Webinar prepared and held on Group 1: Fruit flies‐Tephritidae Bactrocera zonata. This is the third webinar of a round of 20 on EU priority pests, promoted by EFSA in collaboration with academic experts under the framework contract for technical and scientific support to EFSA's training courses on plant pest surveillance to improve plant health crisis preparedness. The webinar provided an overview of the characteristics of B. zonata with a practical simulation using RiPEST. The recording of the webinar is available on EFSA's official YouTube channel and in a dedicated section of the EU Academy.
